comment: In general & functionally it is a very good app just recently: the "tap to translates" function got some problems after your last update. 1- now it is alway on the screen the way is bothering! 2- after killing it, if I want to have it again, must go to app setting to reactivate 3- this translation ball's function also got some problems itself! sometimes runaway from my finger touch! and hide at the top right corner of the screen! appreciate your attention 馃槉馃尮
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
